playlists.title: GASWERK MUSIC DAYS
playlists.description:
Gaswerk Music Days is a 3-day music festival organised by Gaswerksieldung Berlin and taking place in its lush gardens, event space and creative studios. Here experimental electronics, jazz, noise, avant-pop, improvisation and dance music are united under our “Radical Live Music” flag.
A berta.berlin Playlist.

playlists.title: COLOGNE JAZZWEEK
playlists.description:
Showing a selection of some of the great concerts happening at Cologne Jazzweek.
A berta.berlin playlist.

playlists.title: with strings attached
playlists.description:
Showing exquisite performances from contemporary classic to experimental improvisation  by means of beautiful classical instruments.
A berta.berlin playlist.

playlists.title: Jazzwerkstatt Peitz
playlists.description: As part of the close partnership with Jazzexzess berta.berlin also documented the well renowned Jazzwerkstatt Peitz Festival in 2021 with its one of a kind line-up of international artist from the Jazz and Impro-scene and a history of over 60 years.

playlists.title: Berlin - The New Breed
playlists.description:
30 handpicked live-videos at any one time.
We hope you dig it. Updated monthly.

playlists.title: A L'ARME! FESTIVAL
playlists.description:
Originating in the 2020 video edition of the 
A L'ARME! FESTVAL we continued collaboration to capture the unique quality of those artists invited by this one of its kind Festival also in the following years.
A berta.berlin Playlist.

playlists.title: Klangteppich
playlists.description: A berta.berlin playlist showing the documentation of this Berlin based Festival and the special partnership involved here. Klangteppich e.V. was founded in 2019 for the purpose of “the promotion of art and culture, especially the promotion of Iranian art and culture in Berlin.

playlists.title: Deutscher Jazzpreis 2021 (Winner)
playlists.description:
Drawing attention to the German Jazz scene at home and abroad: here are the winners of the German Jazz Prize (Deutscher Jazzpreis) 2021.

Deutscher Jazzpreis 2021
Alle Auszeichnungen
Künstler:innen national
1. Vokal: Lucia Cadotsch
2. Holzblasinstrumente: Daniel Erdmann
3. Blechblasinstrumente: Markus Stockhausen
4. Piano/Keyboards: Aki Takase
5. Gitarre: Ronny Graupe
6. Bass: Eva Kruse
7. Schlagzeug/Perkussion: Christian Lillinger
8. Besondere Instrumente: Christopher Dell
9. Künstler des Jahres: Christian Lillinger
10. Band des Jahres: Philipp Gropper’s PHILM
11. Großes Ensemble des Jahres: Andromeda Mega Express Orchestra

Künstler:innen international
12. Blasinstrumente: Jaimie Branch
13. Piano/Keyboards: Tigran Hamasyan
14. Saiteninstrumente: Wolfgang Muthspiel
15. Schlagzeug/Perkussion: Brian Blade
16. Künstler des Jahres: Tigran Hamasyan
17. Band des Jahres: Shake Stew

Aufnahme / Produktion national
18. Album Instrumental: Julia Hülsmann Quartet – Not Far From Here
19. Album Vokal: Masaa – Irade
20. Debüt-Album: Mirna Bogdanović – Confrontation
21. Rundfunkproduktion: Bill Laurance & WDR Big Band Cologne

Aufnahme / Produktion International
22. Album Instrumental: Carla Bley – Life Goes On
23. Album Vokal: Kandace Springs – The Women Who Raised Me
24. Debüt-Album: Joel Ross – KingMaker

Live
25. Club des Jahres: LOFT
26. Festival des Jahres: 44. Leipziger Jazztage Transitions

Komposition / Arrangement
27. Komposition: Florian Ross – Streamwalk
28. Arrangement: Fabia Mantwill – Ophelia

Sonderpreise
29. Journalistische Leistung: Günther Huesmann, Bird Lives – Zum 100. Geburtstag von Charlie Parker
30. Lebenswerk: Karsten Jahnke
31. Sonderpreis der Jury: Jazzclub Unterfahrt

playlists.title: Midnight music
playlists.description:
Midnight music | Isolated, bluesie, dreamlike, moody, melancholic and menacing tones. Sit down, pour yourself a strong drink and listen to the heartbeat of the city.
A berta.berlin playlist.

playlists.title: All Uploads
playlists.description: All Uploads - Live is better | A celebration of live music appreciation.

playlists.title: FILMED BY EAR
playlists.description:
FILMED BY EAR 
Showing our approach how to capture a live performance in a equally live one-shot-performance when filming it. In these cases in special settings and mostly even without an audience.
A berta.berlin playlist.

playlists.title: LIVING IN A YARD
playlists.description: A berta.berlin Playlist

playlists.title: Highly energetic and powerful
playlists.description:
Highly energetic and powerful. This says it all.
A berta.berlin playlist.

playlists.title: Make Jazz hip (hop) again
playlists.description: Bridging the gap between Art Blakey and Kendrick Lamar, with innovative sounds to liberate the genre. A berta.berlin playlist.

playlists.title: From Krautrock to Krautpop
playlists.description: From Krautrock to Krautpop | Tired of Brit indie groups? Sick of Americana alternative rock? Starting from nothing but their imagination, these German groups offer a third way: a long, straight road out of this cultural impasse.

playlists.title: World goes pop
playlists.description: Listen to the latest tunes from Ukraine, Uganda or Brazil. This could be what life sounds like in the future!

playlists.title: Drumming pioneers & technique virtuosos
playlists.description: Drumming pioneers & technique virtuosos | Communication lies at the core of drumming, music and culture. We present drummers in the natural habitat of their bands.

playlists.title: The inspiration of improvisation
playlists.description: Exploration and invention, rather than boundary and accuracy. Let your creativity soar.

playlists.title: Women's empowerment
playlists.description:
We take action to feature and empower talented underrepresented women!
A berta.berlin playlist.

playlists.title: LIVE FROM BERLIN
playlists.description:
LIVE FROM BERLIN - meaning either concerts or performances that happend in Berlin or artists from or connected to the Berlin music scene playing "abroad".
A berta.berlin playlist.

playlists.title: LIVING IN A BOX
playlists.description:
LIVING IN A BOX is a similarly curated series of concerts from Club GRETCHEN and berta.berlin. We're presenting thrilling musicians from the Berlin scene.
We started this series and collaboration with one of our favorite clubs and organizers during the pandemic and thoroughly recorded in the same setting in Club Gretchens BOX 2.
A berta.berlin playlist.
